Our Products

Topvit

Poultry
Download PDF

Composition

Vitamin A 20 MIU
Vitamin D3 5 MIU
Vitamin E 10g
Vitamin K 3.5g
Vitamin B1 2500mg
Vitamin B2 4.8g
Vitamin B6 2.5ug
Vitamin B12 25000ug
Nicotinamide 25g
Biotin 100g
Vitamin C 25g
Folic Acid 500mg
Calcium Pantothenate 7.5mg
Methinine 10g
Lysine 7000mg
Threonine 2000mg
Valine 500mg
Glutamic Acid 1250mg
Cysteine 510mg
Arginine 480mg
Aspartic Acid 1000mg
Glycien 2600mg
Histidine 80mg
Leucine 300mg
Isoleucine 100mg
Phenylalanine 200mg
Proline 1700mg
Serine 100mg
Tryptophan 20mg
Tyrosine 50gm
Calcium 2000mg
Potassium Chloride 30g
Sodium Sulphate 50g
Zinc Sulphate 15mg
Copper Sulphate 2g
Ferrous Sulphate 1.5g
Magnessium Sulphate 5g
Manganese Sulphate 15g

Indications

      To Overcome:

    • Nutritional deficiency
    • Stress due to vaccination
    • Stress due to weather
    • Electrolyte imbalance
    • Growth disturbance
    • Anorexia
    To Improve:
    • Feed efficiency (FCR)
    • Hatchability
    • Fertility
    • Egg Production
    • Weight Gain
    • Immune status

    Packaging

    1 Liter, 5 Liter

    Dosage

    • Drinking Water: 1 ml per 4 Liter of Drinking Water
